name: Weapons and armour shop
description:
As you slowly climb the ladder leading up into the shop, people all around you
are waiting eagerly for something.  When you reach the top, you notice that the
racks and shelves are nearly empty.  You also realize that all these people are
waiting to see if something useful will be sold.  Then you see the prices on
what remains, and decide that you might not be able to afford what you want,
either.
